threats: Chain-CC risk (1 hard-CC abilities, ~0.5s of lockdown): Bayle Kingslayer (knockback). Don't group tight into it — stagger the engage and hold mobility/cleanse for the key one.
synergy: Your engage/CC: Lt. Belica Neural Disruptor (silence 0.5s), Crunch Right Crunch (knockup 1.25s). Your kills come from landing burst INSIDE that CC window — whoever lands it, the rest must follow up immediately.
You have sustain (Phase) — favor the longer fight where your heals out-grind them.
Your damage is 4/5 physical — predictable; the enemy itemizes one armor item against most of it. A magical pick would split their defenses.
Strong AoE/teamfight kit — group at choke points and fight on top of objectives.

ourKits.combo: Seismic Assault knockup → Void Bomb → Neural Disruptor silence ult, Void Drone mana drain
ourKits.winCondition: knock up + silence a target and burst with missing-HP scaling
ourKits.playAgainst: dodge Seismic Assault; she's immobile — dive when ult is down

ourKits.combo: Telekinetic Link an ally → Psychic Flare blind → Energy Lance → Hyperflux buff ult
ourKits.winCondition: buff a hyper-carry through the Link and Hyperflux for a teamfight
ourKits.passive: abilities heal her and her linked ally
ourKits.playWith: the strongest carry to Link and supercharge
ourKits.playAgainst: kill the linked carry, not Phase; break the link timing

ourKits.combo: Detection Protocol track → Chrono Swipe → Primeval Roar shield → Ursine Burst grab ult
ourKits.winCondition: grab a key target out of position and burst them down
ourKits.playWith: a team that collapses on his grabbed target
ourKits.playAgainst: his grab ult is the whole threat — bait it / stay spaced; CC during Primeval Roar

ourKits.combo: Forward Crunch gap-close stun → Right Crunch knockup → empowered Left Crunch, sustain via Re-Crunch
ourKits.winCondition: all-in a squishy with the empowered combo and heal back through Re-Crunch
ourKits.passive: post-ability empowered basic that refunds cooldowns
ourKits.playWith: peel-stripping engage so he reaches the backline
ourKits.playAgainst: peel/CC him off — without resets he's stranded; anti-heal blunts Re-Crunch

ourKits.combo: Mercy poke → stack Vengeance → Shadow Glide reposition → Purge ult
ourKits.winCondition: stack Vengeance and shred with the channeled Purge
ourKits.playWith: peel so she can channel Purge safely
ourKits.playAgainst: interrupt/CC her during Purge; punish her short dash cooldown

enemyKits.combo: Void Breach slow → Cosmic Rift → Black Hole on the grouped enemies
enemyKits.winCondition: land Black Hole / Cosmic Rift on a clumped team for AoE burst
enemyKits.passive: an ability-empowered basic tethers a target for bonus damage
enemyKits.playWith: hard engage that clumps enemies into his Black Hole
enemyKits.playAgainst: immobile with long cooldowns — dodge the skillshots and dive him once Black Hole is down

enemyKits.combo: Lash Kick gap-close+slow → Windburn %hp basics → Backlash push, Quelling Gale to disengage
enemyKits.passive: Rising Storm stacks grant attack speed
enemyKits.playWith: a team that lets her side-lane and pick
enemyKits.playAgainst: she wants 1v1s — group and burst her; Quelling Gale only stops projectiles

enemyKits.combo: Bull Rush knockback → Force Shield wall → Shield Slam knockup+stun ult, Shield Bash %hp
enemyKits.winCondition: peel the carry with walls/knockups or engage with Shield Slam
enemyKits.playWith: a carry he can wall for and peel
enemyKits.playAgainst: his Force Shield blocks projectiles — reposition around it; bait Shield Slam

enemyKits.combo: Skull Crusher gap-close → Dire Howl slow → Cursed Edge → Kingslayer knockback dash, Berserk at low HP
enemyKits.winCondition: engage, drop low into Berserk and out-brawl
enemyKits.playWith: follow-up while he commits the dive
enemyKits.playAgainst: his Berserk rewards low HP — burst him fully or disengage; anti-heal helps

enemyKits.combo: Old Rusty slow → Gag Grenade silence → Rad Rounds basics → Shrapnel Cannon armor shred
enemyKits.winCondition: kite back, stack Wastelander bleed and Rad Rounds, melt from range
enemyKits.playWith: peel and frontline so he can free-fire
enemyKits.playAgainst: low mobility — dive him or break LoS through his poke; he folds to hard engage

itemTimelineNote: estMin = first minute the role's measured median gold curve covers the cumulative inventory cost (slot order ≈ purchase order) — THEORY, no purchase timestamps in either API

fights.note: caught-out = deaths outside every clustered fight; costs/conversion use a 90s window over timeline majors (older film — no tower times; Fang/Prime/Orb only); itemGap counts participants' items est. online (median-gold model, THEORY)
